case_title: ZIEMNIEWICZ MIROSLAW VS GOLDEN GATE RAILROAD MUSEUM PROJECT 2472 INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,672.34 FILED BY ZIEMNIEWICZ MIROSLAW AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE RAILROAD MUSEUM PROJECT 2472 INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO GOLDEN GATE RAILROAD RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZIEMNIEWICZ MIROSLAW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE RAILROAD MUSEUM PROJECT 2472 INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
